quick_start.userFacingRole: Quick Start private assistant for short case Q&A, intake review, and lighter matter work
quick_start.technicalRole: short source-backed Ask Ross answers, lighter summaries, and quick matter review

case_associate.userFacingRole: Case Associate private assistant for richer matter review, larger files, and longer answers
case_associate.technicalRole: default higher-quality legal assistant, deeper matter reasoning, and longer source-backed Ask Ross

senior_drafting_support.userFacingRole: Senior Drafting Support private assistant for deeper review and drafting
senior_drafting_support.technicalRole: advanced drafting, chronology refinement, issue extraction, deeper matter reasoning

preferred.technicalRole: on-device embeddings for matter and document retrieval

singleRuntimeFallback.technicalRole: fallback on-device embeddings when LiteRT is unavailable
